content_body:
Blue Jeans Pizza & Pasta serves traditional New York-style pizza and Italian dishes using fresh ingredients to ensure quality. Fresh Dough, Hand Tossed Pizza, Calzones & Strombolis. Pasta, Wings, Burgers, Wraps, Hot and Cold Subs. Free Wi-Fi & Big Screen TV, watch the games.

Men's Breakfast & Bible Study every Friday Morning, 8 am

CATERING

Blue Jeans Pizza & Pasta can prepare menu items in larger quantities to feed *10-12 people (half pans) or *20-24 people (full pans). Larger parties need a one-week notice.
title: Blue Jeans Pizza & Pasta
